nasb.text: Your lips are like a scarlet thread, And your mouth is lovely. Your temples are like a slice of a pomegranate Behind your veil.

esv.text: Your lips are like a scarlet thread, and your mouth is lovely. Your cheeks are like halves of a pomegranate behind your veil.

cnv.text: 你的嘴唇像一條朱紅線， 你的小嘴美麗； 你的兩頰在面紗後面， 如同切開的石榴。

ccb.text: 你的唇好像朱红丝带， 你的口娇美， 你面纱下的双颊如两瓣石榴。
